riskAdjusted.label: Balanced
riskAdjusted.description: Balanced baseline with the shared value screen, a 0.75% per-bet cap, and a 2.50% nightly budget on the reference bankroll. Long-shot underdogs above +300 are skipped.
riskAdjusted.optimization_objective: Static balanced default while matched replay coverage remains limited

aggressive.label: Aggressive
aggressive.description: Aggressive baseline with the shared value screen, a 1% per-bet cap, and a 3% nightly budget on the reference bankroll. Long-shot underdogs above +300 are skipped.
aggressive.optimization_objective: Static aggressive default while matched replay coverage remains limited

capitalPreservation.label: Conservative
capitalPreservation.description: Conservative baseline with the shared value screen, a 0.75% per-bet cap, and a 2.50% nightly budget on the reference bankroll.
capitalPreservation.optimization_objective: Static conservative default while matched replay coverage remains limited

strategy_optimization.method: Static defaults active until matched replay coverage reaches at least 60 settled games across 20 replay days (current sample: 101 games across 14 days).

summary.note: Replay uses the latest stored pregame forecast before game time and backfills older gaps with historical diagnostics, paired with the latest pregame odds before game time.
